Off Calendar Jul-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. STEVEN STEIN OF KNOX RICKSEN, TEL. NO. 302-8832 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MICHAEL SPALDING OF HEADNI CHOY LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 892-4848 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BART;
ATTY. JOHN S. WHITTAKER OF DLA PIPER LLP, TEL. NO. (916) 930-7832 APPEARING FOR NON-PARTY CPMC.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT ("BART")'S Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoena; Request For Order Awarding Monetary Sanctions Against California Pacific Medical Center In The Amount Of $8,330.50 - The motion is granted. Howell v. Hamilton Meats (2011) 52 Cal. 4th 541, 555, indicates that the discovery regarding the reasonable value of the medical services is appropriate. The medical expenses must be incurred and reasonable. The court granted monetary sanctions in the amount of $10,000. Deposition to take place by August 21, 2014. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)
